ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the dataset belongs to */,
  "mjd_start" TEXT /* Start date of the dataset (Modified Julian Date) */,
  "mjd_end" TEXT /* End date of the dataset (Modified Julian Date) */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for data collection */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., flux, magnitude) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., photometric, spectroscopic) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the measurement belongs to */,
  "mjd" TEXT /* Date of the measurement (Modified Julian Date) */,
  "band" TEXT /* Band of the measurement (e.g., u, g, r, i, z) */,
  "flux" REAL /* Flux value of the measurement */,
  "fluxerr" REAL /* Error in the flux value */,
  "detected_bool" INTEGER /* Detection flag (0 = not detected, 1 = detected) */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Quality flag (0 = good, 1 = poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_band FOREIGN KEY ("band") REFERENCES bands ("band_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the band (e.g., u, g, r, i, z) */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength of the band */,
  "bandpass" TEXT /* Bandpass of the band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the instrument */,
  "detector_type" TEXT /* Type of detector used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., FITS, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data quality belongs to */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Quality metric (e.g., signal-to-noise ratio, completeness) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the revision belongs to */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_revisions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_access" (
  "team_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team access event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
